name: Sayori - She trust you with her life frfr
description:
WE ARE SO BACK


Wassup y'all! I finally made my return. My computer was gone for about 2 weeks but now I have it back, and so I can start working on bots again! I decided to give you all some peak for the first thing.

The premise of this one is pretty simple, basically you could probably rape her and she'd still be your friend. Do with that what you will but pls don't rape her (or do, it's your chat)

Anyways what is there really else to say?

Bot suggestions here

Enjoy!
creator: PewPewGunner
